'''Rolo droids'''<ref name="Every Droid">{{SWKidsYouTube|series=Star Wars By the Numbers|text=Every Droid in Star Wars|video=UQg6aX7lqTA|nolive=1}}</ref> were a type of [[droid]] that rolled on a singular wheel. One rolo droid was present in [[Mos Espa]] on [[Tatooine]]<ref name="TPM" /> in [[32 BBY]],<ref name="Galactic Atlas">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Atlas]]''</ref> and passed by the [[Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn]] and the young [[Slavery|slave]] [[Anakin Skywalker]].<ref name="TPM" />

{{Droid-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The rolo-droids first appeared, briefly, in [[George Lucas]]'s [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].<ref name="TPM" />
